goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'leicester' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 16:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'cambridge university botanic gardens'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'phone number', and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to leicester and should leave on tuesday
The train should arrive by 16:15 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called cambridge university botanic gardens
Make sure you get entrance fee, phone number, and area
